name: Seafile
description: Manage files on a Seafile library: browse directories, read files, download, rename, move, copy, and delete

credentials_required.label: Seafile Instance URL
credentials_required.hint: Base URL of your Seafile server (e.g. https://seafile.example.com) — no trailing slash. Works with Seafile Cloud and self-hosted.

credentials_required.label: Seafile Library API Token
credentials_required.hint: Create in Seafile web UI: open a library > kebab menu (three dots) > API Token > give it a name and 'Read & Write' permission

tools.name: repo_info
tools.description: Get info about the connected library (name, size, file count)

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: List files and folders in a directory

tools.name: get_file_detail
tools.description: Get metadata for a file (size, last modified, etc.)

tools.name: download_file
tools.description: Get a file download link or read text file content inline

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a binary file (PDF, image, etc.) to Seafile from a file_ref or external URL

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create or overwrite a text file with given content

tools.name: file_operation
tools.description: Rename, move, or copy a file

author: freddy-schuetz
